examples.en: The presidential election will be held next November.
examples.zh: 總統選舉將於明年十一月舉行。

examples.en: Millions of people voted in the election.
examples.zh: 數百萬人參加了這場選舉投票。

examples.en: Citizens have the right to vote at age eighteen.
examples.zh: 公民在十八歲時擁有投票權。

examples.en: Every vote counts in a close race.
examples.zh: 在勢均力敵的競爭中每一票都很重要。

examples.en: Three candidates are running for mayor this year.
examples.zh: 今年有三位候選人競選市長。

examples.en: The candidate gave a speech about education reform.
examples.zh: 這位候選人發表了關於教育改革的演說。

examples.en: Her campaign focused on lowering taxes.
examples.zh: 她的競選活動聚焦於降低稅收。

examples.en: Volunteers worked hard during the campaign.
examples.zh: 志工們在競選活動期間努力工作。

examples.en: Please mark your choice clearly on the ballot.
examples.zh: 請在選票上清楚標記你的選擇。

examples.en: The results of the ballot were announced at midnight.
examples.zh: 投票結果在午夜時公布。

examples.en: The government announced a new health policy.
examples.zh: 政府宣布了一項新的健康政策。

examples.en: A stable government helps the economy grow.
examples.zh: 穩定的政府有助於經濟成長。

examples.en: The president visited the flood-hit region.
examples.zh: 總統視察了受洪水侵襲的地區。

examples.en: She was elected president by a large margin.
examples.zh: 她以極大的優勢當選總統。

examples.en: The new policy will reduce air pollution.
examples.zh: 這項新政策將減少空氣污染。

examples.en: Both parties disagree on foreign policy.
examples.zh: 兩黨在外交政策上意見分歧。

examples.en: Democracy allows people to choose their leaders.
examples.zh: 民主讓人民能選擇自己的領導人。

examples.en: Free speech is important in a democracy.
examples.zh: 言論自由在民主制度中很重要。

examples.en: Every citizen must obey the law.
examples.zh: 每位公民都必須遵守法律。

examples.en: She became a citizen of this country last year.
examples.zh: 她去年成為這個國家的公民。

examples.en: The new law protects workers' rights.
examples.zh: 這項新法律保障勞工權益。

examples.en: Nobody is above the law.
examples.zh: 沒有人可以凌駕於法律之上。

examples.en: Policy makers must consider public opinion.
examples.zh: 政策制定者必須考量民意。

examples.en: The report was written for policy makers.
examples.zh: 這份報告是為政策制定者而寫的。

examples.en: The bill was passed by parliament yesterday.
examples.zh: 這項法案昨天在國會通過。

examples.en: Members of parliament debated the issue for hours.
examples.zh: 議員們就此議題辯論了數小時。

examples.en: The senator supported the education bill.
examples.zh: 這位參議員支持這項教育法案。

examples.en: Several senators voted against the plan.
examples.zh: 數位參議員投票反對這項計畫。

examples.en: The diplomat met with foreign leaders.
examples.zh: 這位外交官會見了外國領導人。

examples.en: A good diplomat must be patient and polite.
examples.zh: 優秀的外交官必須有耐心且有禮貌。

examples.en: The conflict was solved through diplomacy.
examples.zh: 這場衝突透過外交手段解決了。

examples.en: Diplomacy is better than war.
examples.zh: 外交比戰爭更好。

examples.en: You can apply for a visa at the embassy.
examples.zh: 你可以在大使館申請簽證。

examples.en: The embassy is located downtown.
examples.zh: 大使館位於市中心。

examples.en: She was appointed ambassador to France.
examples.zh: 她被任命為駐法國大使。

examples.en: The ambassador gave a speech at the ceremony.
examples.zh: 大使在典禮上發表了演說。

examples.en: The two nations signed a peace treaty.
examples.zh: 兩國簽署了和平條約。

examples.en: The treaty took years to negotiate.
examples.zh: 這項條約花了多年才談成。

examples.en: The countries formed a military alliance.
examples.zh: 這些國家組成了軍事同盟。

examples.en: Their alliance made both nations stronger.
examples.zh: 他們的聯盟使兩國都變得更強大。

examples.en: The nation celebrated its independence day.
examples.zh: 全國慶祝獨立紀念日。

examples.en: Many nations attended the summit.
examples.zh: 許多國家出席了高峰會。

examples.en: The two countries share a long border.
examples.zh: 這兩個國家有著漫長的邊界。

examples.en: Soldiers guard the border day and night.
examples.zh: 士兵們日夜守衛著邊界。

examples.en: World leaders met at the climate summit.
examples.zh: 世界領導人在氣候高峰會上會面。

examples.en: The summit lasted for three days.
examples.zh: 這場峰會持續了三天。

examples.en: The two sides will negotiate a new deal.
examples.zh: 雙方將協商一項新協議。

examples.en: It took months to negotiate peace.
examples.zh: 花了數月才談成和平協議。

examples.en: The border conflict lasted for years.
examples.zh: 邊界衝突持續了多年。

examples.en: They tried to avoid an armed conflict.
examples.zh: 他們試圖避免武裝衝突。

examples.en: Everyone hopes for world peace.
examples.zh: 每個人都盼望世界和平。

examples.en: The leaders signed a peace agreement.
examples.zh: 領導人簽署了和平協議。

examples.en: Thousands joined the protest downtown.
examples.zh: 數千人參加了市中心的抗議活動。

examples.en: People protested against the new tax.
examples.zh: 人們抗議新的稅收。

examples.en: Human rights must be protected everywhere.
examples.zh: 人權必須在各地受到保護。

examples.en: Workers fought for their rights.
examples.zh: 工人們為自己的權利而奮鬥。

examples.en: Freedom of speech is a basic right.
examples.zh: 言論自由是一項基本權利。

examples.en: They fought for their freedom.
examples.zh: 他們為自由而戰。

examples.en: The leader promised to fight corruption.
examples.zh: 這位領導人承諾打擊貪腐。

examples.en: A good leader listens to the people.
examples.zh: 好的領導人會傾聽人民的聲音。

examples.en: A government official answered our questions.
examples.zh: 一位政府官員回答了我們的問題。

examples.en: The official results will be released soon.
examples.zh: 官方結果將很快公布。

examples.en: The finance minister explained the budget.
examples.zh: 財政部長說明了預算。

examples.en: The prime minister visited three countries.
examples.zh: 首相出訪了三個國家。

examples.en: The party won the majority of seats.
examples.zh: 該政黨贏得了多數席次。

examples.en: He joined the political party in college.
examples.zh: 他在大學時加入了這個政黨。

examples.en: The new party came to power last year.
examples.zh: 新政黨去年上台掌權。

examples.en: Power should not be abused by leaders.
examples.zh: 領導人不應濫用權力。

examples.en: Local authorities closed the road for repairs.
examples.zh: 地方當局封閉道路進行維修。

examples.en: He has the authority to make decisions.
examples.zh: 他有權做出決定。

examples.en: The government promised education reform.
examples.zh: 政府承諾進行教育改革。

examples.en: They want to reform the tax system.
examples.zh: 他們想改革稅制。

img: old to new arrow change gears

examples.en: The constitution protects citizens' freedom.
examples.zh: 憲法保障公民的自由。

examples.en: The court ruled the law against the constitution.
examples.zh: 法院裁定該法律違反憲法。

examples.en: The European Union has many member states.
examples.zh: 歐盟有許多會員國。

examples.en: The workers' union asked for higher pay.
examples.zh: 工會要求提高薪資。

examples.en: The country faced economic sanctions.
examples.zh: 該國面臨經濟制裁。

examples.en: Sanctions were lifted after the agreement.
examples.zh: 協議達成後制裁被解除。

examples.en: Foreign aid helped rebuild the city.
examples.zh: 外國援助幫助重建了這座城市。

examples.en: They sent aid to the flood victims.
examples.zh: 他們向水災受害者提供援助。

examples.en: Many refugees fled the war-torn country.
examples.zh: 許多難民逃離了飽受戰火的國家。

examples.en: The camp offers shelter to refugees.
examples.zh: 這個營地為難民提供庇護。

examples.en: Immigration laws differ from country to country.
examples.zh: 各國的移民法各不相同。

examples.en: She works at the immigration office.
examples.zh: 她在移民局工作。

examples.en: The two nations signed a trade agreement.
examples.zh: 兩國簽署了一項貿易協定。

examples.en: Free trade can benefit both countries.
examples.zh: 自由貿易可以使兩國受益。

examples.en: The country's economy is growing quickly.
examples.zh: 這個國家的經濟正快速成長。

examples.en: A strong economy creates more jobs.
examples.zh: 強勁的經濟能創造更多就業機會。

examples.en: The government raised taxes this year.
examples.zh: 政府今年提高了稅收。

examples.en: Everyone must pay income tax.
examples.zh: 每個人都必須繳納所得稅。

examples.en: The two candidates had a live TV debate.
examples.zh: 兩位候選人進行了電視直播辯論。

examples.en: Lawmakers debated the bill all night.
examples.zh: 立法者們徹夜辯論這項法案。

examples.en: The bill was passed by a large majority.
examples.zh: 這項法案以壓倒性多數通過。

examples.en: Lawmakers introduced a new health bill.
examples.zh: 立法者提出了一項新的健康法案。

examples.en: The mayor was arrested for corruption.
examples.zh: 市長因貪污被逮捕。

examples.en: They launched a campaign against corruption.
examples.zh: 他們發起了一場反貪腐運動。

examples.en: The country gained independence in 1947.
examples.zh: 這個國家在1947年獲得獨立。

examples.en: People celebrated the day of independence.
examples.zh: 人們慶祝獨立紀念日。

examples.en: The United Nations is an international organization.
examples.zh: 聯合國是一個國際組織。

examples.en: The organization helps children in need.
examples.zh: 這個組織幫助有需要的兒童。
